subject: feat(theme): migrate from NativeWind to Uniwind + DaisyUI v5
body:
Replace NativeWind v4 with Uniwind for Tailwind-in-React-Native, enabling
DaisyUI v5 theme support with light/dark mode. Uses the Luxe combo pattern
(fantasy light + luxury dark) matching canva-grid's implementation.

Infrastructure changes:
- metro.config.js: withNativeWind → withUniwindConfig
- global.css: DaisyUI oklch @variant theme blocks replace custom HSL vars
- babel.config.js: Remove nativewind presets
- Remove tailwind.config.js (Tailwind v4 is config-free)
- styles/theme.js: Bridge file re-exporting DaisyUI luxury hex values

New files:
- hooks/useTheme.ts: Dark/light toggle with persistence + cross-tab sync
- lib/themeColors.ts: Auto-generated hex lookup for inline styles
- scripts/generate-theme-colors.mjs: oklch → hex generation via culori
- Backward-compat CSS aliases for old class names (bg-background, text-text, etc.)

Tags: theme, daisyui, uniwind, migration, infrastructure
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: major
